subject: Economics
overall_learning_objectives: Analyze the intersection of Availability, Accessibility, and Affordability in food security
Evaluate the socio-economic and regional disparities in food insecurity
Explain the logistical and economic mechanics of Buffer Stock and MSP
Critically assess the evolution and impact of the Public Distribution System (PDS)
Understand the role of the National Food Security Act (2013) and social interventions
Assess the contribution of cooperatives and NGOs in decentralized food security

lesson_plan.title: Dimensions and Vulnerability
topics_covered: The 3-A framework: Availability, Accessibility, and Affordability
Why food security is critical during disasters (Case Study: 1943 Bengal Famine)
Identifying the 'Socially Vulnerable' vs. 'Economically Vulnerable'
teaching_strategy: Comparative analysis of natural calamities vs. food supply
Discussion on the 'Starvation' process: Hoarding and price inflation
student_activities: Draft a report on how a drought affects each of the '3-As'
Analyze a map showing food-insecure regions in India
assessment: Short analytical note on 'Affordability vs. Accessibility'

lesson_plan.title: Hunger and Nutritional Status
topics_covered: Chronic Hunger (Income-based) vs. Seasonal Hunger (Cycle-based)
The nutritional security gap in India
Demographic vulnerability: Women and children
teaching_strategy: Categorization of hunger types through case studies
student_activities: Identify seasonal hunger patterns in agricultural laborers
Construct a table comparing Chronic and Seasonal hunger indicators

lesson_plan.title: Path to Self-Sufficiency: The Green Revolution
topics_covered: Shift from 'Ship-to-mouth' to 'Self-sufficiency'
Impact of HYV seeds on wheat and rice production
Regional production trends (Punjab/Haryana vs. others)
teaching_strategy: Discussion on the 'Wheat Revolution' stamp of 1968
student_activities: Interpret a bar graph showing the rise in food grain stocks
Compare the production growth of wheat vs. pulses

lesson_plan.title: Managing the Surplus: Buffer Stock & MSP
topics_covered: The role of the Food Corporation of India (FCI)
Minimum Support Price (MSP) as an incentive for production
Buffer Stock norms and the cost of storage
teaching_strategy: Flowchart of the grain journey: Farmer -> MSP -> FCI -> Buffer Stock
Discussion on the 'Mountain of Grain' (Excessive buffer stocks)
student_activities: Draw a flowchart of the FCI procurement and distribution cycle
Calculate the difference between MSP and Issue Price for different groups

lesson_plan.title: The Public Distribution System (PDS) Audit
topics_covered: Transition from Universal to Targeted PDS (TPDS)
Ration cards: APL, BPL, and Antyodaya (AAY)
Issue Price: Balancing subsidies and government revenue
teaching_strategy: Discussion on the 'Fair Price Shop' margins and leakages
Comparison of ration card benefits across demographic tiers
student_activities: Analyze the price difference between market rate and issue price
List the structural problems of PDS (e.g., grain rot, diversion)

lesson_plan.title: National Food Security Act & Social Schemes
topics_covered: The Right to Food: National Food Security Act (2013)
Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS) and Mid-day Meals
The role of Aanganwadis in nutritional security
teaching_strategy: Lecture on the legal entitlement to subsidized food
Brainstorming the impact of school meals on attendance and health
student_activities: Draft an awareness flyer for the Antyodaya Anna Yojana
Evaluate the success of the Mid-day meal scheme through provided reports

lesson_plan.title: Decentralized Models and Cooperatives
topics_covered: Cooperatives: Mother Dairy, Amul, and Grain Banks
The role of NGOs (e.g., ADS in Maharashtra)
Chapter Synthesis
teaching_strategy: Case study discussion on 'Grain Banks' for tribal areas
Mind mapping the entire food security network
student_activities: Create a mind map of state vs. non-state actors in food security
Participate in a chapter-end comprehensive quiz

teaching_aids: India map showing food grain production regions
Bar graphs of Buffer Stock levels over time
Flowcharts for PDS and FCI logistics
Case study handouts on Amul and Mother Dairy
teacher_tip: Challenge students to find the balance between 'High MSP' for farmers and 'Low Issue Price' for consumers; explain that the gap is the 'Food Subsidy' paid by the government.
